Question: An ac voltmeter attached across the terminals of a 45-Hz ac generator reads 7.07 V. Write an expression for the emf of the generator.

Show that the rms voltages across a resistor, a capacitor, and an inductor in an ac circuit where the rms current is $$I_{\text{rms}}$$ are given by $$I_{\text{rms}} R , I_{\text{rms}} X_{C} , \text{and} I_{\text{rms}} X_{L} ,$$ respectively. Determine these values for the components of the RLC circuit of Equation 15.12.
